job_description:
Content & Thought Leadership Specialist

The Content & Thought Leadership Specialist will be responsible for developing and maintaining the written voice of 2Base Technologies. This role goes beyond content scheduling and production. It focuses on creating high-quality, insight-driven content that reflects genuine expertise in technology and digital transformation. The specialist will translate complex technical concepts into clear, valuable insights that resonate with senior decision-makers such as CTOs, COOs, and technology leaders.

This position reports to the Marketing & Growth Lead and plays a central role in ensuring that all written content published by the company maintains clarity, credibility, and a consistent brand voice.

Key Responsibilities:

Long-Form Content Development - Create high-quality long-form written content including pillar pages, blogs, playbooks, frameworks, and use-case libraries. - Translate complex technology topics into content that is clear, insightful, and relevant for business and technology leaders. - Ensure content provides practical value and thought leadership, not generic summaries.

Founder Thought Leadership Content - Ghostwrite LinkedIn posts and thought leadership content for the founder. - Capture and maintain the founder’s voice while translating insights into engaging professional content. - Work closely with leadership to ensure authenticity and alignment with real experiences from project delivery.

Content Voice & Quality Ownership - Maintain and enforce the 2Base content voice and quality standards across all written materials. - Review and audit written content before publication to ensure clarity, accuracy, and alignment with brand positioning. - Act as the final quality checkpoint for written content before publishing.

Content Brief Development - Prepare structured content briefs that clearly define the topic, intent, audience, and messaging. - Ensure briefs are detailed enough for other team members to develop initial drafts without ambiguity. - Collaborate with the marketing team to align content with campaign and growth objectives.

AI-Assisted Content Development - Utilize AI tools to support research and drafting while maintaining full editorial control over the final output. - Develop structured prompts and workflows that improve writing efficiency without compromising quality. - Edit and refine AI-assisted drafts to meet publication standards.

Email and Outreach Copy - Write email nurture sequences aligned with marketing campaigns and lead nurturing strategies. - Develop outbound messaging templates used by the outreach team for cold communication initiatives. - Ensure messaging remains consistent with brand voice and strategic positioning.

Requirements:

Required Skills & Expertise - Strong experience writing B2B content, ideally within technology, SaaS, or professional services - Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear, engaging written content - Understanding of SEO fundamentals and search intent-driven writing - Experience writing long-form content such as blogs, guides, and thought leadership articles - Ability to adapt writing style and write in different voices, including ghostwriting for executives - Strong editing skills and attention to detail in maintaining content quality and brand consistency - Familiarity with AI writing tools and the ability to use them effectively while maintaining editorial control - Strong research ability and curiosity about technology, AI, and business operations

Education - Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Communications, Journalism, Marketing, English, Technology, or a related field - Relevant certifications or training in content marketing, technical writing, or digital marketing will be an added advantage

Experience - 4 – 6 years of experience in B2B content writing - Experience creating technology or business-focused content - Experience writing long-form articles that contributed to organic traffic, engagement, or lead generation - Prior experience ghostwriting for senior leaders or executives will be an advantage - Familiarity with SEO-based content development and search intent

Benefits - A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com
summary: The Content & Thought Leadership Specialist creates expert-driven content, ghostwrites for leadership, and ensures brand consistency. Requires 4-6 years in B2B tech content with SEO and AI tool proficiency.

job_description:
Organic Growth & SEO Specialist

The Organic Growth & SEO Specialist will be responsible for building and managing the company’s organic search growth engine. This role ensures that the company’s content and digital assets are structured to attract relevant organic traffic from search engines. The specialist will design and manage the architecture that determines which pages are created, what search intent they target, how they are structured, and how they connect through internal linking. This is a strategic and technical role, not simply a content support role. The position requires a professional who understands how to combine search intent, technical SEO, and structured content architecture to create long-term organic growth. The role reports to the Marketing & Growth Lead and works closely with the Content & Thought Leadership Specialist, design team, and development team to ensure the website performs effectively as a search-driven growth platform.

Key Responsibilities

  • Organic Growth Strategy: Develop and execute the company’s organic search growth strategy for key international markets. Identify high-impact opportunities to increase organic visibility and website traffic. Build a long-term roadmap that enables compounding organic growth over time.
  • Keyword Research & Search Intent Mapping: Conduct keyword research aligned with the company’s services and target markets. Map keywords based on search intent, business relevance, and conversion potential. Prioritize keywords that reflect high commercial or solution-oriented intent.
  • Page Architecture & SEO Structure: Design the SEO architecture of the website, including which pages should exist and how they connect. Define page structures that support strong rankings and clear user journeys. Develop and manage internal linking strategies to strengthen search visibility and content discoverability.
  • On-Page SEO Optimization: Implement on-page SEO best practices across all published pages. Optimize titles, headings, meta descriptions, and internal links to improve search rankings. Ensure content pages align with search intent and technical SEO standards.
  • Technical SEO Oversight: Work closely with the development team to ensure strong technical SEO performance. Monitor and improve site crawlability, indexing, and page performance. Oversee improvements related to site speed, structured data, and Core Web Vitals.
  • SEO Performance Monitoring: Monitor website performance using tools such as Google Search Console and analytics platforms. Identify ranking opportunities, indexing issues, and performance improvements. Provide regular insights and recommendations based on SEO data.
  • Programmatic SEO Development: Design frameworks for scalable programmatic SEO initiatives. Support the creation of structured page templates that allow expansion of content coverage across multiple topics and industries. Ensure programmatic pages maintain strong SEO standards and content relevance.
  • Collaboration With Marketing Team: Provide structured SEO briefs to the Content Specialist to guide content creation. Collaborate with designers and developers to ensure SEO-friendly page layout and implementation. Review and approve link-building targets identified by outreach teams.

Requirements

  • Required Skills & Expertise:
  • Strong understanding of organic growth strategies and search engine optimization
  • Experience performing keyword research and search intent analysis
  • Ability to design and manage SEO architecture and internal linking structures
  • Strong knowledge of on-page SEO and technical SEO principles
  • Experience working with tools such as Google Search Console, Google Analytics, and SEO research tools
  • Understanding of programmatic SEO and scalable content frameworks
  • Ability to translate SEO insights into clear and actionable content briefs
  • Analytical mindset with strong attention to detail
  • Ability to collaborate with marketing, design, and development teams
  • Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Digital Marketing, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field. Certifications in SEO, digital marketing, or analytics tools will be considered an advantage.
  • Experience: 4 – 6 years of experience in SEO or organic growth roles. Experience working on B2B services, technology, or SaaS-related SEO projects. Proven track record of contributing to or achieving search ranking improvements and organic traffic growth. Experience handling technical SEO requirements and website performance optimization. Exposure to international markets such as the US or UK will be an added advantage.

Benefits

A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously. If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Strategic SEO specialist to build organic growth through technical and content-driven strategies, collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive international traffic and improve search rankings.

job_description:
Marketing & Growth Lead

The Marketing & Growth Lead will be responsible for building and managing the company’s marketing growth engine. This role owns the overall marketing strategy, demand generation initiatives, and marketing performance outcomes of the organization. The position requires a professional who can design structured marketing systems, prioritize initiatives based on business impact, and ensure that marketing efforts consistently contribute to qualified pipeline growth. This is a strategic leadership role, not just a coordination role. The Marketing & Growth Lead is expected to take ownership of the direction, effectiveness, and continuous improvement of the company’s marketing initiatives, ensuring that marketing consistently supports the company’s growth and business development objectives.

Key Responsibilities

Marketing Strategy & Growth Planning - Define and execute the company’s overall marketing and growth strategy aligned with business objectives. - Develop structured marketing frameworks that support sustainable lead generation and long-term growth. - Identify high-impact marketing opportunities and prioritize initiatives based on growth potential.

Demand Generation & Lead Development - Own the company’s qualified lead generation targets and ensure marketing efforts contribute directly to the sales pipeline. - Plan and execute demand generation initiatives that attract relevant prospects and increase market visibility. - Continuously optimize marketing initiatives to improve lead quality and conversion potential.

Marketing Funnel Management - Design and manage the end-to-end marketing funnel from awareness to qualified lead generation. - Monitor funnel performance and implement improvements to enhance lead conversion across stages. - Ensure clear tracking and measurement of funnel performance.

Ideal Customer Profile & Market Positioning - Define and refine the company’s Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) based on market insights and business priorities. - Develop clear positioning and messaging frameworks for the company’s services. - Ensure marketing content and campaigns align with strategic positioning.

Campaign Planning & Channel Strategy - Develop and manage marketing campaigns across appropriate channels. - Evaluate channel performance and prioritize marketing investments based on effectiveness and scalability. - Coordinate marketing initiatives across digital platforms, outreach campaigns, and brand visibility activities.

Marketing Analytics & Performance Measurement - Establish clear marketing performance metrics and reporting frameworks. - Implement systems to track marketing performance and measure the impact of campaigns and initiatives. - Use data insights to continuously refine strategies and improve marketing outcomes.

Marketing Team Coordination - Lead and coordinate the marketing team responsible for campaign execution, content creation, outreach activities, and analytics. - Define team priorities and ensure alignment with marketing strategy and business objectives. - Maintain accountability for marketing output quality and performance.

Leadership Collaboration & Strategic Reporting - Provide regular marketing performance reports and insights to leadership. - Contribute to quarterly marketing planning and strategic discussions. - Support leadership in making informed decisions related to marketing investments and growth initiatives.

Requirements

Required Skills & Expertise - Strong understanding of marketing strategy, demand generation, and growth frameworks. - Experience designing and optimizing marketing funnels and lead generation systems. - Ability to build structured marketing processes and scalable marketing programs. - Strong analytical thinking with data-driven decision-making capabilities. - Experience coordinating or leading marketing teams. - Ability to prioritize marketing initiatives based on business impact and growth opportunities. - Strong communication and leadership skills. - Understanding of both inbound and outbound marketing approaches. - Familiarity with marketing analytics, attribution tracking, and performance reporting.

Education - MBA in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field will be preferred. - Relevant certifications or professional training in digital marketing, growth marketing, or marketing analytics will be an added advantage.

Experience - 8 – 15 years of experience in marketing. - Minimum 3 – 4 years of experience in a senior or strategic marketing role. - Experience contributing to or managing lead generation initiatives. - Experience working with cross-functional teams, including leadership and business development teams. - Exposure to international markets will be an added advantage.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.

job_description:
QA Engineer

We are seeking a detail-oriented Associate QA Engineer with 1–3 years of hands-on experience in software testing to join our QA team. In this role, you will ensure the quality and reliability of web and mobile applications by participating in test planning, test case creation, test execution, and defect tracking. You will collaborate with developers, project teams, and senior QA engineers to understand requirements, identify risks, and validate application functionality across scenarios. The role demands a strong testing mindset, attention to detail, and the ability to identify edge cases and potential product issues.

Key Responsibilities

  • Review BRD, SRS, user stories, and functional specifications to understand system requirements.
  • Translate requirements into structured test scenarios and documented test cases for comprehensive coverage.
  • Perform functional, regression, and exploratory testing for web and mobile applications across browsers, devices, and environments.
  • Identify edge cases, alternate flows, and boundary conditions to validate system behavior beyond standard use cases.
  • Log, document, and track defects with clear reproduction steps, evidence, and severity classification using defect management tools.
  • Validate bug fixes and perform regression testing to ensure stability during releases.
  • Participate in release testing cycles and sprint-level validation to confirm feature readiness.
  • Maintain test documentation, execution reports, and QA artifacts for traceability and quality tracking.
  • Support test summaries, progress updates, and QA reports during development and release cycles.
  • Collaborate with business analysts, developers, project managers, and senior QA engineers to clarify requirements and resolve issues.
  • Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies (sprint planning, daily stand-ups, sprint reviews).
  • Perform basic API validation and data verification for correct system behavior at integration levels.
  • Take ownership of assigned modules/features to ensure testing completeness and release readiness.
  • Contribute to improving test coverage, testing approaches, and QA processes.
  • Assist in testing AI-powered/data-driven features by validating output accuracy, response consistency, and system behavior.
  • Continuously learn automation fundamentals, structured testing techniques, and emerging QA tools (e.g., AI testing practices).

Required Skills & Mindset

  • Strong attention to detail and structured thinking.
  • Willingness to deeply understand business logic before testing.
  • Ability to identify edge cases and risks beyond happy paths.
  • Analytical mindset to question unexpected system behavior.
  • Clear written/verbal communication for collaboration.
  • Strong documentation skills for defect reporting and test case writing.
  • Ability to work independently in fast-paced environments.
  • Ownership mindset and positive attitude.
  • Solid understanding of functional, regression, integration, and exploratory testing.
  • Experience with test case design techniques.
  • Familiarity with bug tracking and test management tools.
  • Basic exposure to API testing (Postman, REST Assured).
  • Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies and QA’s role in sprint cycles.
  • Familiarity with AI-assisted testing.

Good to Have

  • Basic awareness of performance and security testing.
  • Interest in learning automation frameworks (Selenium, Playwright, Cypress).
  • Scripting knowledge in Python, JavaScript, or Java.
  • Exposure to AI-enabled applications (chatbots, recommendation engines, generative AI) and testing aspects like prompt variations, response accuracy, and edge case validation.
  • Awareness of modern QA practices (continuous testing in software delivery pipelines).
  • Ability to leverage AI-assisted tools for test case generation, test data preparation, and productivity improvements.
  • Curiosity about test data management (synthetic/test data generation).
  • Experience testing mobile applications or cross-platform systems, or openness to learning frameworks like Appium.
  • Risk-based testing and prioritization mindset.
  • Commitment to continuous learning and staying updated on QA tools/methodologies.
  • ISTQB certification or equivalent testing certification.

Experience & Education

  • 1–3 years of experience.
  • B.Tech in IT, CS, or MCA (Graduates).

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, share your updated resume at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Seeking a QA Engineer with 1-3 years of experience in manual testing, API validation, and Agile methodologies to ensure product quality through comprehensive testing and collaboration with cross-functional teams.

job_description:

We are seeking a Senior DevSecOps Engineer to lead cybersecurity, infrastructure automation, and DevSecOps practices as we transition to a secure, scalable, and modern engineering environment. This role will strengthen 2Base’s security posture, modernize pipelines, and foster a secure-by-design culture. You will collaborate with engineering, product, and leadership teams to ensure systems, applications, and cloud environments are secure, reliable, and future-ready.

Required Skills & Experience - 4–8 years in DevOps, Cloud, or Infrastructure engineering with strong security exposure. - Hands-on CI/CD tools: Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions. - Expertise in AWS, Azure, or GCP with secure architecture focus. - Proficiency in Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform, Ansible). - Experience securing Docker and Kubernetes environments. - Strong networking knowledge (LAN/WAN, firewalls, VPN, load balancers). - Familiarity with security frameworks (OWASP, NIST, CIS Benchmarks). - Monitoring/logging tools: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, CloudWatch, SIEM. - Scripting skills (Python, Bash, Shell). - Excellent troubleshooting, analytical, and problem-solving abilities. - Strong communication and collaboration skills to influence engineering teams.

Benefits - A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

Contact For inquiries, email your resume to careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Lead cybersecurity and DevSecOps practices, modernize secure pipelines, and architect cloud environments with Terraform, Ansible, and AWS/Azure/GCP.

job_description:
Senior Business Analyst

At 2Base, we are rebuilding the Business Analyst function into a world-class, product-minded, clarity-driven team. This role is not a documentation role. It is not a screen updater role. It is not a support role. This is a core Business Analyst position responsible for functional modelling, system reasoning, requirement clarity, and building the foundation for correct development.

  • Lead requirement workshops, client calls, and discovery discussions to understand business needs clearly.
  • Ask deeper questions, challenge assumptions, and validate the true business intent behind every requirement.
  • Convert ambiguous client inputs into structured, logical, and actionable functional understanding.
  • Break large features into modules, workflows, components, and clear dependencies.
  • Build strong system-level understanding involving APIs, integrations, data flow, and backend considerations.

  • Collaborate closely with developers, architects, QA, and product owners to validate feasibility and align understanding.
  • Ensure QA teams can derive test cases effectively from your functional logic and acceptance criteria.
  • Communicate confidently with clients, handle requirement discussions smoothly, and clarify misunderstandings immediately.
  • Push back politely on unclear or changing requirements and ensure final decisions are documented properly.
  • Maintain requirement traceability throughout the lifecycle and ensure zero ambiguity during handover to development.
  • Own the entire requirement lifecycle from discovery to development readiness with high accountability.
  • Drive clarity across teams by ensuring every requirement is complete, validated, and logically consistent.

Required Skills & Experience

  • Minimum 4+ years of core Business Analyst experience with strong analytical and system-level thinking.
  • Ability to break down complex requirements into clear components, workflows, and functional logic.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication with confidence in client interactions and clarifications.
  • Proven experience in preparing SRS, BRD, FRD, workflows, and acceptance criteria with high clarity.
  • Ability to challenge assumptions politely, ask the right questions, and ensure zero ambiguity.
  • Strong collaboration experience with development, QA, architects, and cross-functional teams.
  • Understanding of API behaviours, integrations, data flows, and multi-module system interactions.
  • Ability to run requirement discussions, workshops, and independently lead discovery sessions.
  • Exposure to SaaS, scalable products, automation, or AI-supported systems is an added advantage.
  • Demonstrated ownership of requirements end-to-end, ensuring developer-ready and testable outputs.

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or related field
  • 4 to 8 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst
  • Experience in SaaS or scalable product environments
  • Exposure to AI/Automation, integrations, or multi-module systems
  • Ability to run independent client workshops

job_description:
Cloud & Infrastructure Engineer (Firewall, SAP, PAM)

We’re seeking a hands-on engineer with proven experience in cloud infrastructure, network security/firewall configuration, a practical understanding of SAP landscapes, and Privileged Access Management (PAM) operations. You will design, secure, and optimize hybrid environments, enforce least-privilege across critical systems, and support SAP availability, performance, and compliance requirements.

Key Responsibilities:

Cloud Infrastructure (AWS/Azure/GCP) - Design, deploy, and maintain cloud landing zones using IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation/Bicep) and CI/CD pipelines. - Implement network segmentation (VPC/VNet), routing, security groups/NSGs, and hybrid connectivity (VPN/ExpressRoute/Direct Connect). - Monitor and optimize performance, cost, and reliability; apply autoscaling, backup/restore, DR strategies, and patching baselines. - Enforce cloud security best practices (identity, key management, encryption at rest/in transit, logging/monitoring).

Firewall & Network Security - Configure, harden, and maintain enterprise firewalls (e.g., Palo Alto, Fortinet, Check Point) including policies, NAT, routing, zones, and objects. - Implement content inspection (App-ID, IPS/IDS), SSL decryption where appropriate, and micro-segmentation. - Conduct rule reviews, cleanup, and change management aligned to least-privilege; respond to and remediate security incidents. - Integrate firewalls with SIEM/SOAR for monitoring and automated response.

SAP (Basis & Infrastructure Perspective) - Support SAP system landscape (DEV/QA/PRD) from infra side: sizing, OS/DB basics, HA/DR, backups, and performance troubleshooting. - Coordinate with SAP Basis/application teams on transport strategy, interface connectivity, and secure network paths to SAP services. - Implement and validate SAP-specific network and identity controls (e.g., secure RFCs, SNC, SAPRouter hardening, certificate management). - Ensure infrastructure changes do not impact SAP SLAs; participate in cutovers and maintenance windows.

Privileged Access Management (PAM) - Deploy and administer PAM solutions (e.g., CyberArk, BeyondTrust, Delinea), vaulting privileged credentials, onboarding target systems, and managing session recording. - Implement least-privilege policies, JIT access, MFA/strong authentication, and periodic access reviews with audit-ready evidence. - Integrate PAM with directories/IDP and critical platforms (firewalls, servers, databases, SAP). - Monitor PAM logs/alerts, remediate misconfigurations, and run continuous improvement cycles.

Governance, Risk & Compliance - Document architectures, runbooks, and standard operating procedures. - Maintain compliance with internal policies and external frameworks (e.g., ISO 27001, NIST CSF, SOC 2); support audits with evidence. - Participate in security assessments, threat modeling, and incident response drills. - Drive continuous improvement: automation, standardization, and measurable risk reduction.

Required Qualifications:

Experience: 3–5 years in cloud infrastructure & network security, including hands-on firewall configuration; exposure to SAP landscapes; operational experience with a PAM tool.

Technical Skills: - Cloud: VPC/VNet, IAM, KMS, security groups/NSGs, load balancers, autoscaling, backup/DR, IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation/Bicep), CI/CD. - Network/Firewall: L3/L4/L7 policy design, NAT, routing, VPN, site-to-site, SSL decryption, IPS/IDS, log forwarding/SIEM. - SAP: Basic Basis/infrastructure understanding (S/4HANA or ECC), SAPRouter/SNC, OS/DB fundamentals, HA/DR, performance troubleshooting. - PAM: Vaulting, policy setup, session management/recording, onboarding systems, access reviews, integrations with AD/IDP. - Scripting/Automation: Python/PowerShell/Bash for ops automation and API integrations. - Methodologies: Change management, incident/problem management (ITIL concepts), RBAC/least-privilege. - Soft Skills: Clear communication, documentation, stakeholder engagement, and on-call readiness.

Preferred/“Nice-to-Have”:

  • Certifications: AWS/Azure/Professional; Palo Alto PCNSA/PCNSE; Fortinet NSE; CyberArk Trustee/Defender; SAP Technology Associate; ISO 27001 Lead Implementer/Auditor.
  • Experience with Kubernetes, container security, WAF, Web gateways, ZTNA/SASE.
  • Familiarity with SIEM (e.g., Splunk, Sentinel), vulnerability management (Qualys/Nessus), and EDR/XDR.
  • Experience with regulatory requirements in [your region], and audit support.

Key Competencies:

  • Security-by-design mindset; strong troubleshooting and root-cause analysis.
  • Structured documentation and runbook creation; change control discipline.
  • Cross-functional collaboration with application, security, and infrastructure teams.
  • Ownership and accountability for uptime, performance, and security outcomes.

Performance Indicators (KPIs):

  • Firewall rule hygiene (e.g., reduction in overly-permissive rules by X%).
  • Mean time to detect/respond (MTTD/MTTR) for infra/security incidents.
  • PAM onboarding coverage (percent of privileged accounts/systems vaulted).
  • SAP infra change success rate and SLA adherence.
  • Cost optimization and reliability metrics in cloud (e.g., rightsizing savings, backup/DR test success).
  • Audit readiness: evidence quality and number of nonconformities.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at mitty.j@difinitydigital.com.
summary: Designs secure hybrid cloud environments, enforces least-privilege policies, and supports SAP infrastructure with PAM solutions. Requires 3-5 years of experience in cloud, firewall, and SAP operations.

Build a Strong Future Together

Brief Description

Experience Required: Junior DevOps Engineer with 0.5 - 3 years of experience CTC: 4-6 LPA Location: Trivandrum Work Mode: Work From Office

We are seeking a motivated and proactive Junior DevOps Engineer to support and enhance our cloud-native infrastructure and DevOps practices. This role involves working with modern cloud platforms, containerized environments, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring systems to ensure high availability, scalability, and reliability of applications. The ideal candidate should be hands-on, eager to learn, collaborative, and passionate about automation, cloud technologies, and system reliability.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in building, deploying, and maintaining cloud infrastructure and containerized applications.
  • Work with AWS services (Fargate, ECS, DynamoDB, SNS, etc.) for managing distributed systems.
  • Monitor system performance using CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and Splunk, and respond to alerts.
  • Support CI/CD pipelines using tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and ArgoCD.
  • Troubleshoot issues across infrastructure, networking, containers, and applications.
  • Assist in configuring and managing Kubernetes clusters, including deployments, services, and ingress.
  • Work on networking components such as load balancers, API gateways, reverse proxies, and service communication.
  • Participate in incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and postmortems.
  • Automate repetitive tasks using scripts and tools to improve efficiency.
  • Maintain documentation for infrastructure, deployments, and troubleshooting processes.
  • Collaborate with development and operations teams to improve system reliability and deployment workflows.
  • Participate in on-call or shift rotations to ensure system availability.

Preferred Skills

Cloud Platforms and Services - Basic to intermediate knowledge of AWS services such as ECS, Fargate, DynamoDB, SNS. - Basic to intermediate knowledge of GCP services such as GKE, GAR, CloudSQL, Cloud Run. - Understanding of cloud-native architectures and distributed systems. - Familiarity with infrastructure provisioning concepts (Terraform/CloudFormation is a plus).

Monitoring and Logging Tools - Knowledge of CloudWatch Logs, Loki, Splunk for log analysis. - Familiarity with Prometheus and Grafana for metrics monitoring and dashboarding. - Understanding of alerting systems (Alertmanager) and incident response workflows. - Ability to analyze logs and metrics to identify system issues.

Networking and Security - Strong understanding of load balancers (e.g., ALB, NLB) for distributing traffic and troubleshooting connectivity issues. - Knowledge in API Gateways like AWS API Gateway or NGINX for managing API traffic. - Knowledge of reverse proxies and ingress controllers (e.g., NGINX Ingress, Traefik) for managing internal/external traffic. - Understanding service-to-service communications, including DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, and gRPC protocols. - Experience or hands-on knowledge with firewalls, security groups, and IAM roles for secure communications. - Troubleshooting skills for VM-related issues in platforms like AWS EC2 or equivalent.

DevOps Toolchains - Proficiency with Docker for managing container images and runtime debugging. - Strong understanding of Kubernetes concepts of managing deployments, ingress setups, and pod-related issues and related troubleshooting commands and mechanisms. - Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline building tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD for building, deploying, and managing automated pipelines. - Understanding of Ingress controllers (e.g., NGINX, Traefik) and SSL termination for secure routing.

Troubleshooting and Incident Management - Strong problem-solving skills to identify root causes using logs, metrics, and system-level debugging. - Ability to document detailed troubleshooting steps and solutions for recurring issues.

Collaboration and Communication - Ability to work with cross-functional teams (DevOps, development, and operations) to resolve incidents. - Skills in effective and proactive communication to escalate issues and provide updates during shift handovers. - Proficiency with tools like Slack, JIRA, Confluence, or Google Workspace for collaboration and issue tracking.
summary: Junior DevOps Engineer role in Trivandrum requiring 0.5-3 years experience. Focus on cloud infrastructure, AWS, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines for scalable application reliability.
